If Start ACC Suite.cmd or Start Portal Discover.cmd closes immediately:

1. Check bootstrap logs FIRST (always created):
   %USERPROFILE%\ACC-Suite\logs\acc-bootstrap.log       (ACC Suite)
   %USERPROFILE%\ACC-Suite\logs\portal-bootstrap.log  (Portal Discover)

2. Double-click again - the window should pause on error so you can read red text.

3. Check detailed run logs (if launcher-log.ps1 is present in your dist folder):
   %USERPROFILE%\ACC-Suite\logs\acc-suite-*.log
   %USERPROFILE%\ACC-Suite\logs\portal-discover-*.log

4. If acc-bootstrap.log says "CMD started" but nothing after "launch.ps1 started",
   PowerShell may be blocked by group policy - contact IT.
   If you see a parse error in portal-bootstrap.log, re-download the latest dist
   (scripts must be UTF-8 with BOM and ASCII-only for Windows PowerShell 5.1).

5. If bootstrap logs are empty, the .cmd file may be from an old download.
   Re-download the latest dist from GitHub main and confirm bootstrap-log.ps1
   and launcher-log.ps1 are in the same folder as launch.ps1 / portal-discover.ps1.

6. Email acc-bootstrap.log or portal-bootstrap.log (and any acc-suite-*.log) to Prakriti.
